title: Pale Garden Village
description: Adds a Village To The New Pale Garden Biome
body:
# Pale Garden Village

Within this biome, you’ll find a small, peaceful village. The homes in this village are built from pale wood and stone, giving them a weathered, simple appearance. The villagers here focus on farming and growing the local plants and flowers, with small gardens around each home where crops and flowers flourish. The layout of the village is compact, with narrow, winding paths connecting the houses.

Villagers in this area offer simple trades such as farming goods, flowers, and useful items like stone tools and basic materials. The village is quiet, making it a great spot to gather resources or take a break from your adventures. At night, the houses are lit by basic lanterns, creating a calm and welcoming atmosphere.
